mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simulation_config ( initial_amount, monthly_deposit, duration_years, kr_inflation_rate, tax_rate ) VALUES ( #{initialAmount}, #{monthlyDeposit}, #{durationYears}, #{krInflationRate}, #{taxRate} )
mapper.select: SELECT config_id AS id, initial_amount, monthly_deposit, duration_years, kr_inflation_rate, tax_rate, created_at FROM simulation_config WHERE config_id = #{id}
